title: [Maelstrom Bay, Surface]
description: The slow-moving swells of the bay disguise the swift currents that make it impossible to move to the west.  To the east is the tall, steep cliff of the mainland.  The island of River's Rest is visible to the southeast.
paths: Obvious paths: north, northeast, east, southeast, northwest, down

wayto.11438: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'east' else move 'swim east' end; waitrt?
wayto.11439: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'north' else move 'swim north' end; waitrt?
wayto.11446: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'northwest' else move 'swim northwest' end; waitrt?
wayto.11448: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'southeast' else move 'swim southeast' end; waitrt?
wayto.11450: ;e if checkspell(112) then move 'northeast' else move 'swim northeast' end; waitrt?
